quote: XBRL tag InvestmentIncomeInterest: FY2022 RMB 3,997,100,000; FY2023 RMB 10,238,080,000; FY2024 RMB 20,553,493,000.

XBRL InterestIncomeDepositsWithFinancialInstitutions: FY2022 RMB 2,442,413,000; FY2023 RMB 5,750,934,000; FY2024 RMB 7,314,780,000. InterestIncomeOperating: FY2022 RMB 606,447,000; FY2023 RMB 1,354,785,000; FY2024 RMB 2,827,453,000.
Investment income equals 19% of FY2024 operating income and 18% of net income. FY2024: Investment income RMB 20.55B / Operating income RMB 108.42B = 19.0%.
Q3 2025 interest and investment income was RMB 8.57B; Q2 2025: RMB 10,422.6M. Q1 2025: RMB 223.1M (anomalously low). 9-month total: approximately RMB 19,210.9M.

Cash/equivalents + short-term investments: RMB 331.6B (Dec 2024) -> RMB 364.5B (Mar 2025) -> RMB 387.1B (Jun 2025) -> RMB 423.8B (Sep 2025). Growing at approximately RMB 30B/quarter. Management unanimously agreed no buybacks or dividends anticipated in foreseeable future.
PDD's gross margin (~61%) is the highest among Chinese e-commerce peers. PDD Holdings ~60.9% (FY2024). Alibaba ~39-41%. JD.com ~16%.
PDD's operating profit in Q1 2024 alone (RMB 25.9B) equaled the combined operating profits of Alibaba (RMB 14.7B) and JD.com (RMB 7.7B), despite PDD's revenue being far smaller.

PDD has NO fintech business unlike Alibaba (33% of Ant Group) and JD.com (JD Technology). PDD's RMB 20.55B investment income provides fintech-equivalent profit contribution without the regulatory risk.
Market share estimates for Chinese domestic e-commerce (2024): Alibaba ~44%, JD.com ~24%, Pinduoduo ~19%.
FY2024: Revenue RMB 393.8B, Gross margin 60.9%, Operating income RMB 108.4B, Operating margin 27.5%. FY2023: Operating margin 23.7%. FY2022: Operating margin 23.3%.
FY2024 net margin 28.5% exceeds operating margin 27.5% due to RMB 20.55B investment income.
FY2024: Total revenues RMB 393,836.1M (+59% YoY). Online marketing services: RMB 197,934.2M (+29%). Transaction services: RMB 195,901.9M (+108%). Mix shifted from 62%/38% to 50%/50%.
Q4 2024: Total revenues RMB 110,610.1M (+24% YoY). OMS RMB 57,011.1M (+17%). TS RMB 53,599.0M (+33%). Net income RMB 27,446.6M (+18%).
Q1 2025: Revenue RMB 95,672.2M (+10%). OMS RMB 48,722.2M (+15%). TS RMB 46,950.0M (+6%). Operating profit RMB 16,085.6M (-38%). Net income RMB 14,741.8M (-47%).
Q2 2025: Revenue RMB 103,984.8M (+7%). TS RMB 48,281.6M (~flat). Operating profit RMB 25,792.9M (-21%). Net income RMB 30,753.5M (-4%).
Q3 2025: Revenue RMB 108,276.5M (+9%). OMS RMB 53,347.6M (+8%). TS RMB 54,928.9M (+10%). Operating profit RMB 25,025.9M (+3%). Net income RMB 29,328.2M (+17%).
Revenue growth decelerated: FY2023 +90%, FY2024 +59%, Q1 2025 +10%, Q2 2025 +7%, Q3 2025 +9%. Transaction services growth collapsed from +108% (FY2024) to +6%/flat/+10%.
PDD's blended take rate is approximately 4-5%. Pinduoduo domestic take rate ~3-4%. Alibaba marketplace take rate ~5%.
Pinduoduo main app could achieve RMB 4.7T GMV in 2025 with an improving take rate approaching 5%, matching Alibaba's level.
Alibaba Taotian take rate ~5%, increasing via 0.6% software service fee + Quanzhantui penetration (now 30%, target 45-50% in FY2026).

PDD operates dual-engine: Pinduoduo (domestic, pure marketplace, revenue NET, estimated GMV ~RMB 4-5T, likely 40%+ segment operating margin) + Temu (international, managed marketplace transitioning to semi-managed, revenue GROSS).
Online marketing services represented 50.3% of FY2024 revenue (RMB 197.9B). This is CPC/CPM advertising revenue with near-100% incremental margin.

VIE accounted for 56.2%, 45.7%, and 22.5% of total revenues for 2022, 2023, and 2024. A RMB 100 Temu order contributes ~RMB 100 to revenue (gross), while a RMB 100 Pinduoduo order contributes ~RMB 4-5 (net).
PDD Holdings Inc. does not have any equity ownership in the VIE or its subsidiaries. It maintains contractual arrangements (WFOE agreements).
Temu semi-managed model generated US$5.5B in GMV in Q3 2025, approximately 29% of total Temu GMV. The shift reduces PDD's direct logistics cost exposure and tariff risk.
Temu.com US requires login/registration to browse products. Footer: '2022-2026 Whaleco Inc.' Local Warehouse items ship from within US, no import taxes.
Temu 2024 GMV: ~$70.8B. 2025 GMV estimated ~$92.5B. US MAU collapsed 54%: ~34M (May 2024) to <8M (May 2025). 87% of Americans trust Amazon vs only 5% trust Temu.
European GMV on track to surpass $15B in 2025, could top $20B by end of 2026. US accounts for 29% of Temu revenue in 2025. EU MAU grew 74% YoY to 141.6M, surpassing US (133.6M).
PDD reallocated 20-30% of ad budget to Europe. Temu halted Google Shopping ads in US on April 9, 2025. US ad spend down 31% in two weeks.
Lei Chen, Q2 2025: 'We continued to invest in merchant support initiatives, and are encouraged by the progress made towards a healthier and more sustainable platform ecosystem.'

Lei Chen, Q3 2025: 'Today, with a rapid evolution of trade barriers, we are seeing a significant shift in the regulatory environment for the global business. We will inevitably face greater challenges and uncertainties.'
De minimis exemption ($800 threshold) ended May 2, 2025 for China/Hong Kong. Expanded to all countries August 29, 2025.
Temu stated: 'Temu's pricing for U.S. consumers remains unchanged as the platform transitions to a local fulfillment model. All sales in the U.S. are now handled by locally based sellers.'
90% of Temu's pre-tariff business relied on the fully managed model using de minimis; only 10% was semi-managed.
Temu now operates three parallel models: fully-managed, semi-managed (merchant handles logistics), and third-party platform (launched March 2025, merchant has full autonomy).
Semi-managed model generated approximately $5.5B in GMV, about 29% of Temu's total.
Fully managed model has ~20% loss rate. Temu subsidizes $2.99 per order for goods below $30.
Strategic shift to semi-managed with local warehouses boosted US profit margins from 2% to 4%.
temu.com ranked #377 globally on Tranco list as of March 19, 2026. Improving from 383 (Mar 15).
Temu global MAU peaked at 530 million in August 2025. Cumulative downloads exceeded 1.2 billion by October 2025.
US MAU declined 28% YoY to 133.6 million (Oct 2025). US daily active users plunged 58% after de minimis ended.
EU MAU grew 74% YoY to 141.6 million. EU accounts for 34% of global user base in 2025. EU now surpasses US.
Low customer retention: only 24% of first-time buyers likely to return.
By October 2025, Temu operated 13 self-owned warehouses globally: 10 in Europe, 2 in the US, 1 near US-Mexico border (120,000 sqm 'Jitu Warehouse').
Pinduoduo iOS App Store rating in CN: 2.9/5 (3,380,424 ratings).
Pinduoduo CN: 2.93/5 (3,380,562 ratings). Taobao CN: 4.14/5 (1,679,186 ratings). Gap: -1.21 points.
Temu US: 4.67/5 (2,064,730 ratings). Amazon US: 4.83/5 (8,344,524 ratings). Temu trails Amazon by only 0.16 points.
Temu App Store 4.67 vs Trustpilot 2.0 -- 2.67-point gap, largest among shopping apps. 10.9% of Trustpilot reviews likely AI-generated (up 1,361% from 2022).
10 CPSC recalls involve products sold exclusively on Temu.com. All children's safety products.
Pinduoduo cumulative complaints on Heimao exceed 1 million. Only 119,620 completed (11.9% resolution rate).
Pinduoduo receives approximately 767 complaints per day on Heimao. 30-day completion rate: 3.68%.
Pinduoduo replied to only 20% of complaints. JD.com, Douyin, Dewu, Kuaishou: 100%. Taobao: 5%.
Amazon: 64% of consumers plan increased spending. Temu: 28% shop monthly. Shein: 23% shop monthly. Amazon Haul: 16% shop monthly.
On April 22, 2025, all five major platforms simultaneously cancelled 'refund-only' defaults. SAMR mandated the reform.
After reform: Pinduoduo malicious refund-only orders decreased 62%, merchant dispute resolution success rate rose from 18% to 75%.
Pinduoduo launched '千亿扶持' program: 100 billion yuan over 3 years in merchant support. Upgraded from previous '百亿减免' (10B fee reduction).
Long-time customers report 'a decline in quality, deceptive images.' 'Prices creeping up to levels where other sites are cheaper with far better quality.'
Temu Trustpilot: Rating 2.0/5, 48,750 total reviews.
GMV Method 1 (Revenue/Take Rate): Domestic GMV = RMB 3.9-5.4T. Temu GMV ~$50-70B. Total RMB 4.3-5.9T.
GMV Method 2 (Logistics): ZTO delivered 38.52B parcels in FY2025 (19.4% market share). PDD estimated 25-30% of industry = 50-60B parcels/year. Implied domestic GMV RMB 3.6-5.4T.
ECDB: Amazon ($845B), Pinduoduo ($817B), and Douyin ($648B) topped global e-commerce by GMV in 2025.

Shoppers confronted with 'import charges' of 130-150%. Temu transitioned to local fulfillment model. Transaction services revenue grew merely 1% YoY in Q2 2025 (vs 234% in Q2 2024). Gross margin shrank to 55.9% from 65.3%.
Transaction services revenue for Q2 2025 grew by merely 1% YoY (vs. 234% YoY in Q2 2024). PDD's gross profit margin shrank to 55.9% in Q2 2025, down from 65.3% in Q2 2024.
US apparel tariff rates are 14.6-16.6% MFN. Section 321 exemption eliminated these duties for shipments under $800.
CBP processed approximately 4.5 million Section 321 entries per day in 2024, representing 95.1% of all US import entries.
